description_long: This is a single-story, modern ranch-style house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The house features multiple entry points, including a prominent front porch with wooden decking and supporting columns. The layout includes several rooms arranged around a central open area, with visible interior partitions and some accent walls in blue. The rear and side elevations have additional wooden deck areas, suggesting outdoor living spaces. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story ranch house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and extensive wooden decking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, large windows, and a wide wooden deck with supporting columns.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting additional deck space, blue accent walls, and a more private window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view with a long stretch of wooden decking, multiple sliding doors, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more deck area, several windows, and a compact room layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide wooden porch with steps, supporting columns, and a simple modern door.
